prompt_improvements.improvement: Explicitly instruct the implementor to handle duplicate blob writes using narrow Azure error shapes (ResourceExistsError, 409 BlobAlreadyExists, and 412 ConditionNotMet/PreconditionFailed), while re-raising all other HttpResponseError cases.
Require at least one test that proves unexpected storage HTTP errors are re-raised and not silently swallowed.
Require tests to directly exercise both ResourceExistsError and HttpResponseError branches in blob write logic.
